headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) Gets Barclays Upgrade as AI Disruption Fears Seen Overdone
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Oversold Insurance Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) is among the most oversold insurance stocks. TheFly reported on March 11 that Barclays upgraded AJG to Overweight from Underweight and raised the price target to $262 from $247. According to the firm, […]
